name: Comcast Corporation
description: Comcast Corporation is a global media and technology company that connects millions of people to moments and experiences that matter. The company primarily operates through three business segments: Comcast Cable (Xfinity), which provides high-speed internet, video, voice, wireless, and security services; NBCUniversal, which operates news, entertainment, and sports cable networks, the NBC NBC television network, filmed entertainment, and theme parks; and Sky, a leading entertainment company in Europe offering direct-to-consumer services and broadband.
